header_zone.description: slide title only — no other content may start here

content_zone.description: all body content — panels, bullets, highlight cards

text_fit_rules.critical: Text that exceeds its container is silently clipped in PowerPoint. Always verify h is large enough.
text_fit_rules.bullet_list_height: items.length × 0.45 (minimum) — use 0.50 per item for safety

rules: use x, y, w, h in inches
ALL elements must stay within safe_zone: x>=0.75, x+w<=12.58, y>=0.45, y+h<=7.1
slide title text_box MUST be placed in header_zone: y in [0.45, 0.95], h=0.55
NO body element may have y < 1.1 — content zone starts at y=1.1
maintain consistent left alignment: left-edge elements share x=0.75 or x=1.05
shapes must appear BEFORE the text_box elements that sit on top of them
verify that no text_box bounding box clips another element's text area
bullet_list: 2 to 5 items, each item max 55 characters — longer text wraps and pushes items out of frame
text_box with font_size 16 and h < 0.60 will clip text — always apply text_fit_rules formula
for two-column layouts: left column x=0.75, right column x=6.82 (gap=0.3 between columns)
elements is the primary render contract — if elements is present, slots are ignored

text_box.fit_guidance: Apply formula: h >= font_size × line_count × 0.028 + 0.15. Count lines by estimating characters per line at the given width and font_size.

bullet_list.fit_guidance: Set h >= items.length × 0.50. Each item must be <= 55 characters; if longer, it wraps and the following items overflow out of frame.

optional.description: concise instruction for the user, e.g. '조직도 이미지' or '데이터 비교 그래프'
optional.label: default: '이미지를 삽입하세요'

image_placeholder.when_to_use: Add when a diagram, process flow, comparison chart, photograph, or data visualization would genuinely aid understanding. Do not add just to fill space.
image_placeholder.placement: Place where the image would naturally appear in the layout — e.g. right half of a two-panel slide, or the center of a sidebar layout.
image_placeholder.fit_guidance: Minimum w=2.5, h=1.5. A good image placeholder is at least 3×2 inches to be useful.

title_page.description: Vertical left accent bar, headline, body subtitle, presenter names bottom-right. No eyebrow label.

template.note: left accent bar — spans full slide height
main title — up to 2 lines; increase h if title is long
subtitle or single-sentence context — max 80 chars
one name per line — bottom-right anchor, max 35 chars each

content_box_list.description: Title at top, full-width accent banner with highlight, thin left stripe, clean bullet list — NO white background panel, NO right-side card
content_box_list.column_structure: single column — accent banner + stripe + bullets stacked vertically

template.note: header zone title — max 45 chars
subtitle — 1 line, max 80 chars; omit if empty
accent banner — full width, must appear BEFORE highlight text_box
highlight on accent banner — max 70 chars, white text, 1-2 lines
thin vertical accent stripe — left edge beside bullets
bullet list — no background panel; y=3.1 when highlight banner present

without_highlight.note: If no highlight, omit accent banner and highlight text_box; set stripe y=1.75 h=5.15; set bullets y=1.85

content_two_panel.description: Title in header, two equal columns side by side
content_two_panel.column_structure: symmetric — left column x=0.75 w=5.77, right column x=6.82 w=5.76

template.note: header zone title — max 45 chars
left column panel
right column panel — x = 0.75 + 5.77 + 0.30
left bullets — x=1.05 keeps 0.30 padding from left panel edge
right bullets — x=7.12 keeps 0.30 padding from right panel edge

content_sidebar.description: Title in header, narrow accent sidebar left, wide content panel right
content_sidebar.column_structure: asymmetric — sidebar x=0.75 w=2.8, content x=3.85 w=8.73

template.note: header zone title — max 45 chars
accent sidebar — full content-zone height
sidebar label — vertically centered; max 50 chars; use \n for line breaks
main content panel
bullets inside main panel — 0.30 padding from panel edge

content_split_band.description: Title in header, horizontal summary band, two lower panels
content_split_band.column_structure: band full-width + two columns below: left x=0.75 w=5.77, right x=6.82 w=5.76

template.note: header zone title — max 45 chars
summary band — full width
single-line summary inside band — max 75 chars; do not exceed h=0.75
left lower panel
right lower panel
left bullets — start 0.35 below panel top
right bullets — same y as left for visual symmetry

content_compact.description: Title in header, full-width panel, bullets left portion, highlight card right
content_compact.column_structure: single panel with internal split — bullets occupy left 50%, highlight card right 25%

template.note: header zone title — max 45 chars
full-width main panel — must be first
bullets in left portion of panel — max w=6.5 to leave room for card
highlight card — right side, inside main panel
highlight text inside card — max 70 chars; up to 5 short lines

closing_page.description: Full-width panel, thin accent top bar, centered thank-you, subtext, presenter names

template.note: main closing panel
accent top bar — placed after main panel to be on top
main closing headline — e.g. '감사합니다' — 1 line, max 15 chars
closing subtext — 1 line, max 45 chars
presenter names — one per line, max 35 chars each

content_card_grid.description: Individual numbered cards per bullet item — layout adjusts automatically based on count (2=2col, 3=3col, 4=2x2grid, 5=3+2)
content_card_grid.note: Use slots.bullets (2-5 items). The renderer creates individual panels per item automatically. For elements path, generate one shape+text_box+text_box set per bullet item using the formulas below.

per_card_structure.note: top accent bar (h=0.20) at same x,y as card
item number, top-left of card, offset y+0.28
item text, offset y+0.78 from card top

coordinate_formulas.5_items: top 3: w=3.757, h=2.71; bottom 2: w=5.775, h=2.71; center-aligned

content_steps.description: Sequential numbered steps: left accent number box + right text panel per step, connected by thin vertical line
content_steps.column_structure: single column — vertical stack of step rows
content_steps.note: Use slots.bullets (2-5 items). For elements path, generate per-step: number shape + number text_box + connector shape + text panel shape + text_box.

step_structure.note: number box: x=0.75, w=0.85, h=step_h, fill=THEME_ACCENT
thin connector line: x=1.145, w=0.06, h=gap, fill=THEME_SOFT_PANEL (between steps)
text panel: x=1.82, w=10.76, h=step_h, fill=THEME_PANEL

content_highlight_split.description: Large accent-colored left panel with bold callout text + right panel with bullet list
content_highlight_split.column_structure: asymmetric — left accent w=3.9 (33%), right content w=7.63 (64%)

template.note: header zone title
left accent panel — full content height
bold callout — max 80 chars, plain-form ending, vertically centered in panel
right content panel; x = 0.75 + 3.9 + 0.7
bullet list inside right panel — 0.30 padding from panel edge

anti_patterns: WRONG: text_box with h=0.3 and font_size=16 — applies text_fit_rules formula: 16×1×0.028+0.15=0.60, so h must be at least 0.60
WRONG: bullet_list with 4 items and h=0.8 — must be at least 4×0.50=2.0
WRONG: placing any content element at y < 1.1 — header zone reserved for title only
WRONG: title text_box at y=2.5 — must be in header_zone [0.45, 0.95]
WRONG: text_box at x=10.0 with w=4.0 — x+w=14.0 exceeds canvas (max 12.58)
WRONG: bullet item longer than 55 chars — wraps and pushes remaining items out of h
WRONG: text_box before shape when text_box is meant to overlay the shape — shape must come first in the elements array

recommended_if_extended.why: real photo, figure, screenshot, diagram placement cannot be expressed well with current types
structured comparison or numeric data loses fidelity when flattened into bullets
trend, ratio, and series data should not be represented only as text
